Stitch it in the shades shown, or mix it up to match your bathroom décor! title: Willow Yarns Pastel Bliss Banner

Bring a sense of tranquility to your décor with this lovely boho-inspired wall hanging. Stitched in pastel shades of Willow Farmhouse Cotton Yarn, this hexagon-shaped wall hanging is stitched from the center out 
with overlapping rows of bobble stitches and petal-shaped clusters to create an intricate mandala filled with texture. The experienced crochet pattern can be stitched in the soft shades shown, or try mixing up the colors for a look entirely your own!
